---
title: "Resource Usage Plots"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)

required_packages <- c(
  "tidyverse",
  "ggplot2",
  "dplyr",
  "readr",
  "patchwork",
  "cowplot",
  "grid",
  "RColorConesa",
  "ggpattern"
)

missing_packages <- required_packages[!required_packages %in% installed.packages()[, "Package"]]
if (length(missing_packages) > 0) {
  message("Installing missing packages: ", paste(missing_packages, collapse = ", "))
  install.packages(missing_packages, repos = "https://cloud.r-project.org")
}

library(tidyverse)
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(readr)
library(patchwork)
library(cowplot)
library(grid)
library(RColorConesa)
library(ggpattern)

r_source_dir <- if (dir.exists("R")) "R" else "src/plotting/R"
source(file.path(r_source_dir, "00_figure_config.R"))
source(file.path(r_source_dir, "02_themes.R"))
source(file.path(r_source_dir, "11_resource_plots.R"))
out_dir <- plot_creation_dir()
```

```{r load-data}
resource_tsv <- if (file.exists("resource_summary.tsv")) {
  "resource_summary.tsv"
} else {
  file.path("src", "plotting", "resource_summary.tsv")
}

resource_data <- read_tsv(
  resource_tsv,
  col_names = c(
    "data_type", "tissue", "tool", "strategy",
    "summary", "elapsed_time", "cpus", "cpu_time",
    "memory", "memory_GB"
  )
)

resource_data <- resource_data %>%
  mutate(tool = if_else(tool == "bambu", "Bambu", tool))

print(resource_data)
```

```{r clean-data}
resource_data <- resource_data %>%
  select(-summary, -cpus, -memory) %>%
  mutate(memory_GB = as.numeric(str_sub(memory_GB, 1, -3)))

print(resource_data)
```

```{r create-all-plots}
# Legacy 3×4 per-tool grids (commented). Uses create_resource_tool_plots() from 11_resource_plots.R.
```

```{r brain-ranking-grid}
pb_brain_cpu <- create_resource_ranking_plot(
  metric = "cpu", data_type = "PacBio", tissue = "brain", data = resource_data
)
pb_brain_ram <- create_resource_ranking_plot(
  metric = "ram", data_type = "PacBio", tissue = "brain", data = resource_data
)
ont_brain_cpu <- create_resource_ranking_plot(
  metric = "cpu", data_type = "ONT", tissue = "brain", data = resource_data
)
ont_brain_ram <- create_resource_ranking_plot(
  metric = "ram", data_type = "ONT", tissue = "brain", data = resource_data
)

brain_ranking_grid <- assemble_resource_ranking_grid(
  pb_brain_cpu,
  pb_brain_ram,
  ont_brain_cpu,
  ont_brain_ram,
  title = "Ranking of Computational Resource Usage"
)

brain_ranking_grid

paper_ggsave(
  file.path(out_dir, "brain_ranking_grid.pdf"),
  plot = brain_ranking_grid,
  size = "resource_ranking_2x2"
)
```

```{r kidney-ranking-grid}
pb_kidney_cpu <- create_resource_ranking_plot(
  metric = "cpu", data_type = "PacBio", tissue = "kidney", data = resource_data
)
pb_kidney_ram <- create_resource_ranking_plot(
  metric = "ram", data_type = "PacBio", tissue = "kidney", data = resource_data
)
ont_kidney_cpu <- create_resource_ranking_plot(
  metric = "cpu", data_type = "ONT", tissue = "kidney", data = resource_data
)
ont_kidney_ram <- create_resource_ranking_plot(
  metric = "ram", data_type = "ONT", tissue = "kidney", data = resource_data
)

kidney_ranking_grid <- assemble_resource_ranking_grid(
  pb_kidney_cpu,
  pb_kidney_ram,
  ont_kidney_cpu,
  ont_kidney_ram,
  title = "Ranking of Computational Resource Usage"
)

kidney_ranking_grid

paper_ggsave(
  file.path(out_dir, "kidney_ranking_grid.pdf"),
  plot = kidney_ranking_grid,
  size = "resource_ranking_2x2"
)
```


```{r source_data_capture, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
# ---- Source Data capture: resource ranking grids (F10 brain / SF18 kidney) ---
# Each figure is a 2x2 grid: platform (PacBio/ONT) x metric (CPU hours / max RAM
# GB). Both metrics per tool come from resource_data (one row per tool x
# strategy): CPU panel plots parse_time_to_hours(cpu_time), RAM panel plots
# memory_GB. One tidy sheet per tissue with both metric columns.
.sd_resource <- function(resource_data, ti) {
  resource_data %>%
    dplyr::filter(.data$tissue == ti) %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
      platform  = dplyr::recode(.data$data_type, IsoSeq = "PacBio"),
      cpu_hours = vapply(.data$cpu_time, parse_time_to_hours, numeric(1L))
    ) %>%
    dplyr::transmute(
      platform,
      tool = .data$tool,
      strategy = .data$strategy,
      cpu_hours,
      max_ram_GB = .data$memory_GB
    ) %>%
    as.data.frame()
}

add_source_sheet("Fig 10",
  "Figure 10: computational resource usage per tool (brain); CPU time (hours) and maximum RAM (GB) per platform and combination strategy.",
  .sd_resource(resource_data, "brain"))
add_source_sheet("Supplementary Fig 18",
  "Supplementary Fig. 18: computational resource usage per tool (kidney); CPU time (hours) and maximum RAM (GB) per platform and combination strategy.",
  .sd_resource(resource_data, "kidney"))
```
